title: Klaviyo vs Campaign Monitor (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Klaviyo and Campaign Monitor. Learn pricing, features, and which email marketing platform suits your business best.
h1: Klaviyo vs Campaign Monitor: Complete Comparison
intro: Klaviyo and Campaign Monitor are both established email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs. Klaviyo excels at e-commerce automation with predictive analytics and SMS capabilities, while Campaign Monitor focuses on beautiful design and multi-brand management for agencies. Choosing between them depends on your industry, team structure, and feature requirements.
choose_a_if: You run an e-commerce store on Shopify or WooCommerce and need advanced automation
You want to start free and scale as your business grows
Predictive analytics and SMS marketing are important to your strategy
choose_b_if: You're an agency managing campaigns for multiple clients or brands
You prioritize email design and template customization
You need transactional email capabilities built in

faq.q: Is Klaviyo better than Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Klaviyo is better for e-commerce brands needing automation and predictive analytics, with higher G2 ratings (4.6 vs 4.1). Campaign Monitor excels for agencies managing multiple brands with a focus on design. Neither is universally "better"—it's about fit.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Klaviyo or Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Klaviyo offers a free tier up to 500 subscribers, making it cheaper for small businesses starting out. Campaign Monitor's lowest plan is $11/month with no free option. However, Klaviyo's paid plans start at $45/month, so costs depend on your subscriber count and needs.

faq.q: Can I switch from Campaign Monitor to Klaviyo?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support standard email list imports and exports. You can migrate your contacts, though automation workflows and templates will need to be recreated in Klaviyo. Most email marketing platforms provide migration guides to simplify the process.
